subcommands.name: startOrReload
subcommands.description: start or gracefully reload JSON file

subcommands.name: pid
subcommands.description: return pid of the specified app or all

subcommands.name: startOrGracefulReload
subcommands.description: start or gracefully reload JSON file

subcommands.name: scale
subcommands.description: scale up/down a process in cluster mode depending on the `number` p...

subcommands.name: gracefulReload
subcommands.description: gracefully reload a process. Send a “shutdown” message to close all...

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: stops and deletes a process from pm2 process list

subcommands.name: sendSignal
subcommands.description: send a system signal to the target process

subcommands.name: ping
subcommands.description: ping pm2 daemon - if not it will launch up

subcommands.name: updatePM2
subcommands.description: update in-memory PM2 with local PM2

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: update in-memory PM2 with local PM2

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: install or update a module and run it forever

subcommands.name: module:generate
subcommands.description: generate a sample module in current folder

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: publish the module you are currently on

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: get value for the specified key

subcommands.name: report
subcommands.description: give a full pm2 report for https://github.com/Unitech/pm2/issues

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: login to keymetrics and link current PM2

subcommands.name: dump
subcommands.description: dump all processes for resurrecting them later

subcommands.name: attach
subcommands.description: attach stdin/stdout to application identified by pm id

subcommands.name: startup
subcommands.description: setup script for pm2 at boot

subcommands.name: describe
subcommands.description: describe all parameters of a process id

subcommands.name: desc
subcommands.description: describe all parameters of a process id

subcommands.name: jlist
subcommands.description: list all processes in JSON format

subcommands.name: prettylist
subcommands.description: print JSON in a prettified JSON

subcommands.name: dashboard
subcommands.description: launch dashboard with monitoring and logs

subcommands.name: pull
subcommands.description: updates repository for a given app

subcommands.name: forward
subcommands.description: updates repository to the next commit for a given app

subcommands.name: backward
subcommands.description: downgrades repository to the previous commit for a given app

subcommands.name: gc
subcommands.description: force PM2 to trigger garbage collection

subcommands.name: deepUpdate
subcommands.description: performs a deep update of PM2

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: serves a directory over http via port
